description:
Antenna and Radio Data File Editor

A separate application, AntRad, is used to create and edit radio and antenna data files for the Pathloss 4, 5 and 6 programs. The program is also used to convert version 4 data files to the version 5 format and version 5 to version 4. AntRad is included with the Pathloss 5 program and is also available separately as a free download.
